data.body:
Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC tier)

Root cause candidate: code-review-dispatch.md prompt template does NOT instruct the reviewer sub-agent to export WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR before running write-reviewer-findings.sh. The per-worktree-review-commit.md documents the fix (pass WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR env var to sub-agents so get_artifacts_dir() returns the orchestrator's ARTIFACTS_DIR), but the standard code-review-dispatch.md prompt template lacks this instruction.

get_artifacts_dir() in deps.sh already has the override hook (line 267): if WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR is set, it returns that path. The env var just needs to be passed to sub-agents.

Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag not present but this is straightforward enough. Will dispatch basic investigation.
